scripts.zk:compile: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('circuits/build', { recursive: true })" && npx circom2 circuits/ScoreTierProof.circom --r1cs --sym -o . && copy /Y circuits\ScoreTierProof.r1cs circuits\build\ScoreTierProof.r1cs && copy /Y circuits\ScoreTierProof.sym circuits\build\ScoreTierProof.sym
scripts.zk:ptau: npx snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 12 circuits/pot12_0000.ptau -v && npx snarkjs powersoftau contribute circuits/pot12_0000.ptau circuits/pot12_0001.ptau --name="FlowPay ceremony" -v -e="flowpay-tier-proof" && npx snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 circuits/pot12_0001.ptau circuits/pot12_final.ptau -v
scripts.zk:zkey: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('circuits/build', { recursive: true })" && npx snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/ScoreTierProof.r1cs circuits/pot12_final.ptau circuits/build/score_tier_0000.zkey && npx snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/build/score_tier_0000.zkey circuits/build/score_tier_final.zkey --name="FlowPay final" -v -e="flowpay-final"
scripts.zk:verifier: npx snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier circuits/build/score_tier_final.zkey ../blockchain/contracts/ScoreTierGroth16Verifier.sol
